name: The binding of Isaac - RPG (ABANDONED BOT)
description:
This is the first RPG ever made of the Binding of Isaac, and I don't mean only on Janitor.ai, I checked all platforms! So, I'll be the (Blood of) Martyr and create the first one! It's really long, because I will do EVERY ITEM, EVERY HUMANIZED BOSS, EVERY PICKUP AND GIVE EVERY STAT A MEANING IN A SEXUAL WAY.

Btw, don't judge a Tboi player just because he wants to fuck demons, it's not my fault that they made them sexy...

I'll take a lot of time to finish this bot, but enjoy the start of it :3

Edit 1: Sorry, I'm a bit sick, but I fixed the intro. I'll do more when I'll feel better
creator: Dracus_Cyberus
